title: conyza newii
intro: Conyza newii, also known as New Zealand button daisy, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and is a member of the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Conyza newii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a popular herb in natural remedies. Conyza newii can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
